---
name: feature-refinement
description: Turn a raw business or product request into a structured feature draft with scope, assumptions, acceptance criteria, and traceable specification updates.
---

# Feature Refinement

## Use For

- turning a raw request into a structured feature draft
- clarifying scope, non-scope, assumptions, and acceptance criteria

## Read First

- `delivery/workflows/business-to-spec-workflow.md`
- `delivery/roles/business-analyst.md`
- `templates/business-request.template.md`
- `templates/spec-refinement.template.md`
- `templates/feature-spec.template.md`

## Outputs

- clarified problem summary
- scope and non-scope
- assumptions and open questions
- candidate requirements
- candidate acceptance criteria
- draft feature spec
